skills.name: commit-message
skills.description: Writes a Conventional Commits message from a staged git diff. Use when the user asks to draft, write, or improve a commit message, or before committing changes.

skills.name: example-echo
skills.description: Echoes the user's input back verbatim. Use only to verify end-to-end that skill loading, the catalog, and the lint pipeline work — not for real tasks.
